issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which indicates DuringYourTurn, not EndOfTurn. Duration should be 'DuringYourTurn'.
Target should include condition that Leader has {Navy} type. Current target lacks the LeaderHasType condition check.

Trashing a card is optional ('You may trash'), but current DSL structure makes PowerBoost trigger only after trash. Should be conditional: if trash occurs AND Leader is Navy type, then apply PowerBoost. Needs proper condition gating.
